mapper.select: INSERT INTO tb_nlcf_collect ( request_url, page_no, num_of_rows, result_code, result_msg, success_yn, error_message, collected_count, raw_response, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{requestUrl}, #{pageNo}, #{numOfRows}, #{resultCode}, #{resultMsg}, #{successYn}, #{errorMessage}, #{collectedCount}, #{rawResponse}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) RETURNING collect_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_nlcf_story ( collect_id, title, alternative_title, creator, reg_date_raw, collection_db, subject_category, subject_keyword, extent, description, spatial_coverage, temporal_info, person_info, language, source_title, reference_identifier, rights_info, copyright_others, content_url, contributor, hash_key, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt ) VALUES ( #{collectId}, #{title}, #{alternativeTitle}, #{creator}, #{regDate}, #{collectionDb}, #{subjectCategory}, #{subjectKeyword}, #{extent}, #{description}, #{spatialCoverage}, #{temporal}, #{person}, #{language}, #{sourceTitle}, #{referenceIdentifier}, #{rights}, #{copyrightOthers}, #{url}, #{contributor}, #{hashKey}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (hash_key) DO UPDATE SET collect_id = EXCLUDED.collect_id, title = EXCLUDED.title, alternative_title = EXCLUDED.alternative_title, creator = EXCLUDED.creator, reg_date_raw = EXCLUDED.reg_date_raw, collection_db = EXCLUDED.collection_db, subject_category = EXCLUDED.subject_category, subject_keyword = EXCLUDED.subject_keyword, extent = EXCLUDED.extent, description = EXCLUDED.description, spatial_coverage = EXCLUDED.spatial_coverage, temporal_info = EXCLUDED.temporal_info, person_info = EXCLUDED.person_info, language = EXCLUDED.language, source_title = EXCLUDED.source_title, reference_identifier = EXCLUDED.reference_identifier, rights_info = EXCLUDED.rights_info, copyright_others = EXCLUDED.copyright_others, content_url = EXCLUDED.content_url, contributor = EXCLUDED.contributor, use_yn = 'Y', upd_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
